metadata.name: Squad — Ultramarines Honour Guard with squad_count=2 creates 2 token copies
metadata.description: Tests the Squad mechanic (CR 702.157a-b) using Ultramarines Honour Guard ({3}{W}, Squad {2}). P1 casts Ultramarines Honour Guard paying the base cost {3}{W} plus the squad additional cost {2} twice (squad_count=2), for a total of {7}{W}. The spell resolves and the creature enters the battlefield. The SquadTrigger then fires as an ETB triggered ability (CR 702.157b) and is placed on the stack. When the trigger resolves, 2 token copies of Ultramarines Honour Guard are created on the battlefield. Final state: 3 creatures on p1's battlefield — the original plus 2 token copies.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.157a: Squad is an additional cost keyword. The cast_spell_squad action with squad_count=2 causes p1 to pay {2} twice as an additional cost on top of the base cost {3}{W}. Total mana paid: {3}{W} + {2}{2} = 7 generic + 1 white. CR 702.157b: When the creature enters the battlefield, its ETB trigger (SquadTrigger, SOK discriminant 52) fires, creating squad_count token copies. Tokens are copies of the creature, not cast (so no cast triggers fire). The trigger is placed on the stack after the creature resolves and enters; both players pass priority, then the trigger resolves creating 2 tokens. Final battlefield count for p1: 3 (1 original + 2 token copies). The +1/+1 anthem ability on Ultramarines Honour Guard is a DSL gap (OtherCreaturesControlledBy not implemented) — it is not exercised or asserted in this script. Mana calculation: generic=7 (3 base + 2+2 squad), white=1.

script.step_note: P1 casts Ultramarines Honour Guard with squad_count=2, paying {7}{W} total. Spell resolves, ETB SquadTrigger fires. Trigger resolves creating 2 token copies.

actions.description: Initial: Ultramarines Honour Guard in p1 hand, battlefield empty, stack empty
actions.note: P1 holds the card and has {7}{W} available: base {3}{W} + squad {2} x2.
CR 702.157a: P1 pays additional cost {2} twice (squad_count=2) on top of base {3}{W}. Total paid: {7}{W}. Card moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After casting: Ultramarines Honour Guard on stack, hand empty
actions.note: CR 601.2: Spell on stack awaiting priority passes before resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Creature spell resolves; Ultramarines Honour Guard enters the battlefield under p1's control.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Ultramarines Honour Guard resolves and enters the battlefield. The SquadTrigger (ETB) sees squad_count=2 and is placed on the stack.

actions.description: After spell resolves: Ultramarines Honour Guard on battlefield, SquadTrigger on stack
actions.note: CR 702.157b: ETB trigger fires and is placed on the stack. CR 603.2: Triggered ability placed on stack above any existing objects.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — SquadTrigger resolves.

resolution.note: CR 111.1, 702.157b: First token copy of Ultramarines Honour Guard created on p1's battlefield.
CR 111.1, 702.157b: Second token copy of Ultramarines Honour Guard created on p1's battlefield.

actions.note: CR 702.157b: SquadTrigger resolves. For each of the 2 times the squad cost was paid, create one token that is a copy of Ultramarines Honour Guard. Tokens are NOT cast — no cast triggers fire (ruling 2022-10-07).

actions.description: Final: 3 Ultramarines Honour Guard on p1's battlefield (1 original + 2 token copies), stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.157b: squad_count=2 caused 2 token copies to be created. P1 controls 3 creatures total: the original Ultramarines Honour Guard and its 2 token copies.
